caption: The video features a static image with a dark background and a central red circular area containing text. The text is a religious quote from 1 Peter 2:24, which reads, "He Himself bore our sins in His body on the Cross so that we might die to sin and live to righteousness; for by His stripes you were healed." The text is presented in a clear, white font that stands out against the red background. In the bottom left corner, there is a small watermark or signature that reads "Roseline K." The scene remains unchanged throughout the frames, suggesting a moment of reflection or emphasis on the message conveyed by the scripture. The overall tone of the video is solemn and contemplative, inviting viewers to ponder the significance of the words displayed.
